{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Overlord Herald
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] states that there has never been an [[Overlord Herald]] until [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There is no such thing as an Overlord Herald,” Northstrider said. His stony face quirked into a small smile. “Until now.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
